_doc: POSITIVE fixture for the D6-1 ecosystem-bare-org-slug shape (ECO-IMPL W1-S3). Basename matches /^ecosystem.*\.json$/ but is NOT the exact `ecosystem.json` (which isExcluded skips). The two BARE lowercase-slug org/host values below have no `/`, no repo-family, no git context — invisible to the nonfoundation-org-slug shape, caught only by the file-scoped ecosystem-bare-org-slug shape. The example-* / <org> / docker.io values MUST NOT flag (allowlist + dot-in-host). All tokens SYNTHETIC.
